prompt:
A printed journal report page lying on a workstation desk beside a keyboard and terminal-lit monitor, showing dense structured service events and timestamps implied by short lines and aligned columns. It should feel like an exported incident-triage artifact, with no readable words.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft desk lighting, realistic paper and keyboard textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the page centered and uncluttered.
